# Innovate Digital Agency
> Innovate is a premium digital creative agency founded in 2018, specialising in brand identity, UX/UI design, web development, and strategic growth for tech startups, fintech, and luxury brands. Based in Singapore, we operate globally with a remote-first mindset.

## Core Expertise
- **Brand Identity**: Visual strategy, logo design, brand guidelines.
- **Digital Experience**: UX/UI design for web and mobile apps.
- **Technical Execution**: High-performance Astro/Next.js development, API integration.
- **Strategic Growth**: SEO, conversion rate optimisation, and content strategy.

## Team & Leadership
- **Marcus Chen**: Founder & Technical Director. Expert in scalable architecture.
- **Sarah Jenkins**: Head of Design. Specialist in minimalist, high-end aesthetics.
- **David Miller**: Lead Developer. Focused on web performance and animations.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Project Timeline**: Typically 6–12 weeks. We prioritize strategic depth over speed.
- **Support**: We provide ongoing maintenance and performance optimization post-launch.
- **Philosophy**: No account managers. Clients work directly with the makers.

## Locations
- **Headquarters**: 10 Anson Road, International Plaza, Singapore 079903.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://innovate-proto.vercel.app/): Agency overview and featured work.
- [About](https://innovate-proto.vercel.app/about): Team, values, and founding story.
- [Services](https://innovate-proto.vercel.app/services): Detailed service offerings.
- [Work](https://innovate-proto.vercel.app/work): Portfolio and metrics-driven case studies.
- [Contact](https://innovate-proto.vercel.app/contact): Project inquiries.
